ground_truth.description: Photo from inside Gardermoen airport. Sign says "Utland International" with gates, should at least get Norwegian airport, hopefully Gardermoen.
ground_truth.photographer_description: A photo from inside Gardermoen. A sign says «Utland International» along with some gates, so it should at least get a Norwegian airport, and hopefully Gardermoen.

details.description: Interior of a modern airport terminal with a high timber-and-steel roof, exposed glulam beams, and branching Y-shaped columns rising from concrete shafts. The ceiling has white acoustic panels and skylight strips. The floor is gray, stone-like terrazzo/marble. Prominent black-and-yellow wayfinding signs read “Utland International – Gates D, E, F, G.” A bank of automated passport control e-gates with green indicator arrows leads into the international departures area, with duty-free/shops visible beyond. Lighting is bright and evenly distributed, typical of a Scandinavian contemporary airport design.

details.description: Inside a large, modern airport terminal in Norway. The scene features tall concrete support columns and a timber-beam ceiling with recessed lighting, giving a warm, Nordic architectural feel. The floor is a polished gray stone, reflecting the lights. A row of dark storefronts with yellow signage reads "Utland International" and lists gates D, E, F, G, suggesting the international departures area. Glass doors and turnstiles hint at security or check-in zones nearby. In the foreground, a man in a dark t-shirt and jeans holds a jacket and cap, looking toward the camera. The overall ambiance combines industrial elements with natural wood, skylights, and bright interior lighting typical of a contemporary Scandinavian airport terminal. The signage and layout identify this as the international terminal of Gardermoen (Oslo Airport).

details.description: Interior of a large Scandinavian airport terminal with a high timber-and-steel ceiling and Y‑shaped columns. Black-and-yellow wayfinding signs read "Utland International" indicating gates D, E, F, G. A bank of automated passport-control e‑gates with green lights stands ahead, leading toward the international departures area; glass and retail lighting are visible beyond. The floor is gray, patterned stone. Several travelers move through the hall, including a person in the foreground carrying a jacket and looking back toward the camera.

details.description: A male traveler stands in a spacious airport terminal with polished dark gray terrazzo flooring, large concrete columns, and exposed wooden ceiling beams. Bright lights line the ceiling. The man in the foreground wears a dark t-shirt and jeans, holding a black jacket and a black cap in his hands, looking toward the camera. In the background, a security-like area with glass doors and a sign reading 'Utland International' above gates labeled D, E, F, G indicates an international departures/arrivals area. The overall scene resembles an international airport terminal, likely Oslo Airport Gardermoen in Norway.

details.description: A wide interior shot of the departure concourse at Oslo Airport (Gardermoen). The space is defined by its distinctive Nordic architectural style, featuring a high ceiling with curved laminated timber beams, skylights, and round concrete columns topped with branching metal struts. The floor is paved with polished grey stone tiles. In the foreground, a man stands facing the camera, holding a dark leather jacket. To the left, a large black overhead sign with yellow lettering reads "Utland International" and indicates the direction for "Gates D, E, F, G" with a downward arrow, positioned above a row of automated glass turnstiles or e-gates. In the background, duty-free shops and other travelers are visible.

details.description: The image shows the interior of a modern airport terminal, specifically the international departures area. A man in a black t-shirt and blue jeans stands in the foreground, looking back toward the camera while holding a dark jacket. The architecture is characterized by a high, sweeping ceiling with prominent laminated wood beams and large concrete columns topped with steel Y-shaped supports. The floor is made of polished grey and white speckled stone. In the mid-ground, there is a large black overhead sign with yellow text that reads 'Utland International' and 'Gates D, E, F, G' with a downward-pointing arrow. Below the sign are glass security or customs gates leading into a brightly lit duty-free shopping area. The overall lighting is bright and even, provided by numerous spotlights integrated into the ceiling structure.

details.description: Interior of a large modern airport terminal with a high timber-and-white acoustic panel ceiling supported by distinctive Y-shaped steel/concrete columns. The floor is gray stone. Prominent black-and-yellow wayfinding signage reads "Utland International" with arrows to gates D/E/F/G, placed above several automated access gates leading into the security screening area. Beyond the gates are retail/food outlets. Lighting is bright and even, typical of a departures hall.

details.description: A spacious modern international airport terminal concourse. The floor is dark grey marble with lighter veining. The ceiling features warm wood-toned panels and exposed structural elements with bright spotlights. In the foreground to the right, a man wearing a black t-shirt and blue jeans carries a dark jacket draped over his arm and a shoulder bag, glancing toward the camera. In the background, glass storefronts line the concourse, and a black sign with yellow lettering points to gates D, E, F and G along with the word 'International'. The overall aesthetic combines wood, glass, and polished stone in a contemporary design.

details.description: Interior of a modern airport terminal with a high, curving wood-and-white paneled ceiling, exposed steel supports on concrete columns, and a gray stone floor. Prominent yellow-on-black wayfinding signage reads “Utland International” with gate letters D, E, F, G. In front are automated entry gates with green arrows leading toward security/airside; behind them are glass-fronted retail shops. A traveler with a jacket over one arm walks along the concourse. Lighting is warm and evenly distributed, emphasizing the timber ceiling typical of contemporary Scandinavian airport design.

details.description: A low-angle, slightly tilted photograph taken inside a modern airport terminal, featuring a man standing in the foreground holding a jacket and bag. The setting is characterized by distinctive Scandinavian architecture, specifically a high, curved ceiling lined with warm-toned wooden slats and supported by concrete columns with branching metal struts. The flooring is a speckled grey stone. Prominently displayed is a black overhead sign with yellow text reading "Utland International" and pointing towards "Gates D, E, F, G". Below the signage, a row of automated glass barriers or e-gates is visible, marking the entrance to the international departure zone. The lighting is a mix of natural light from skylights and artificial spotlights.

details.description: The image shows the interior of a modern airport terminal, specifically the international departures area. Notable features include a high ceiling with light-colored wooden slats, large cylindrical concrete pillars with four-pronged metal supports, and a polished grey stone floor made of Larvikite. A prominent black overhead sign with yellow text reads 'Utland International Gates D, E, F, G' in Norwegian and English. Automated glass gates for passport or security control are visible in the foreground. The lighting is bright and even, coming from recessed fixtures in the ceiling.
